name: GH_ParamAccess
summary: Enumerates the types of access that parameters support.

enum_values.name: item
enum_values.summary: Every data item is to be treated individually.

enum_values.name: list
enum_values.summary: All data branches will be treated at the same time.

enum_values.name: tree
enum_values.summary: The entire data structure will be treated at once.
